name: Neon Frequencies
description: An electrifying night with the legendary Daft Punk, featuring their iconic helmets and a full live audiovisual show. Expect an immersive journey through electronic music history with cutting-edge visuals and sound.

name: Midnight Thunder
description: Metallica returns to Madrid for one of the most powerful metal concerts of the decade. A setlist spanning 40 years of thrash metal glory, with pyrotechnics and a massive stage production.

name: Blue Note Night
description: An intimate jazz evening with the incomparable Norah Jones. Velvet vocals, piano mastery, and a setlist of soulful originals and beloved covers in the stunning surroundings of Teatro Real.

name: Street Pulse
description: Bad Bunny brings his world tour to Barcelona in a massive open-air spectacle. Reggaeton, trap, and Latin urban anthems in an unforgettable night at Camp Nou.

name: Dreamwave
description: Coldplay's Music of the Spheres World Tour arrives in Madrid with their legendary LED wristbands, confetti cannons, and a setlist of timeless anthems from Yellow to Higher Power.

name: Symphony No.9
description: The Berlin Philharmonic performs Beethoven's iconic Ninth Symphony in a once-in-a-generation concert event. Experience one of the greatest orchestral works ever composed in perfect acoustics.

name: Bass Drop Festival
description: Tiësto headlining a spectacular electronic festival night in Barcelona. Multi-stage setup with cutting-edge production, laser shows, and an all-night journey through the best in progressive house and techno.

name: Rock en Seine
description: Arctic Monkeys bring their cinematic indie rock to Barcelona in a night of moody anthems and swagger. From R U Mine? to Do I Wanna Know?, every track hits harder live.

name: Jazz al Fresco
description: Diana Krall performs an open-air summer concert in the magical gardens of Pedralbes. A perfect evening of jazz standards, original compositions, and the warm Barcelona night air.

name: Urban Flow
description: J Balvin lights up Madrid with his Color World Tour. An explosion of reggaeton, urban pop, and Latin trap wrapped in a vibrant multi-color stage experience.

name: Indie Summer
description: Tame Impala headlines Primavera Sound Barcelona with a hypnotic psychedelic set. Currents, The Slow Rush, and deep cuts blending live instrumentation with electronic layers.

name: Vivaldi en Vivo
description: The Orquestra de Cadaqués presents Vivaldi's Four Seasons and other Baroque masterpieces in the historic Gran Teatre del Liceu. An evening of timeless elegance in one of Europe's finest opera houses.
